description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a dark, multi-faceted hip roof and light-colored exterior walls. The front facade features a row of tall, narrow shrubs and large windows, providing a welcoming and open appearance. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor seating, and a well-maintained lawn bordered by a fence. Several blossoming trees and a swing set add a touch of nature and playfulness to the garden area. The property also includes a detached garage with a driveway and a side entrance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, large windows, a backyard pool, and landscaped garden with blossoming trees and a detached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, tall shrubs, large windows, and part of the landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio area, and blossoming trees in the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garden with multiple blossoming trees and the side of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and rear facades
